creator: egypcio@FreeBSD.org
text:
Already merged code from upstream integrated to this port:

  * https://sourceforge.net/p/openvpn-admin/code/158
  * https://sourceforge.net/p/openvpn-admin/code/159
  * https://sourceforge.net/p/openvpn-admin/code/160

May benefit Russian native speakers quite well.
